recommendations: Immediate medical attention required - may indicate SVT, VT, or severe stress
Check for symptoms: chest pain, dizziness, shortness of breath
Monitor for accessory pathway patterns, consult if symptomatic
May be associated with WPW syndrome
Immediate medical evaluation - risk of Torsades de Pointes
Review medications that may prolong QT interval
Ensure adequate rest and stress management
Consider relaxation techniques, adequate sleep, and regular exercise
